message:
feat(core): schema generation tracking, virtual table module registry, and prepared statement dispatch

Connection schema tracking and virtual table initialization:
- Add schema_generation field (Cell<u64>) to track same-connection DDL
  invalidation separately from cross-connection schema cookie changes
- Update PreparedStatement to cache schema_generation at prepare time and
  validate both cookie AND generation in ensure_schema_unchanged()
- Add default_vtab_module_registry() that pre-registers FTS5, JSON_EACH,
  JSON_TREE, and GENERATE_SERIES table-valued function modules at connection
  creation, replacing empty HashMap initialization
- Add dispatch_precompiled_program() method for safe control over when
  precompiled VDBE programs are reused vs recompiled
- Rename has_subquery_source() to has_fallback_from_source() for clarity,
  now correctly detecting all non-table FROM sources (derived tables, TVFs)
- Switch UNIQUE violation diagnostics to use idx.key_label() for better
  error messages on expression and partial indexes

ext-json: export JSON_TABLE_COLUMN_NAMES constant with standard json_each/
json_tree output column names for use in virtual table registration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
